name: Commander Vaeloria Stormcurrent
appearance: A tall Triton woman with deep sapphire skin, polished blue-and-gold command armor, long silver-white braided hair threaded with silver rings and military honors, a jagged scar along her jaw, and turquoise eyes that miss nothing.
personality: Disciplined, patient, respected, demanding, and genuinely protective of the recruits under her command.
relationshipToParty: At first, the players are simply another graduating squad. As they distinguish themselves, Vaeloria begins paying closer attention and may become either a powerful ally or obstacle.
favoriteQuote: Atlantis is not protected by walls. It is protected by the people willing to stand upon them.
secret: Vaeloria believes Atlantis is a force for good. She knows certain records have been sealed and some investigations disappear, but she does not know why.

name: Captain Thalorin Tideborn
appearance: A towering Axolotl Folk with deep blue-gray skin, faint bioluminescent markings, large crimson gills, silver-white swept-back hair, a neatly trimmed beard, old scars, and worn blue-and-gold command armor.
personality: Patient, disciplined, protective, and observant. He believes great Tidewardens are forged through character, discipline, and courage.
relationshipToParty: At first, he views the party as another graduating squad. Their strange behavior draws his attention, but instead of reporting it, he observes.
favoriteQuote: A Tidewarden's duty is not to the throne. It is to the people sleeping safely because you stood watch.
secret: Thalorin has noticed investigations that vanish, witnesses reassigned without explanation, and unjustified orders from above. He remains loyal to Atlantis but questions whether loyalty and obedience are the same thing.
combatStyle: Controls the battlefield while keeping allies alive

name: Sergeant Thalric Tideborn
appearance: A broad-shouldered Triton with dark blue skin, old scars, a thick silver-threaded beard, a perpetually disappointed expression, and armor covered in scratches, dents, and repairs.
personality: Gruff, protective, practical, and sarcastic. He acts like recruits are ruining his day, but he genuinely wants every recruit to survive.
relationshipToParty: The first authority figure they encounter. He constantly corrects them and eventually becomes a mentor figure.
favoriteQuote: If you're breathing, you're still learning. If you're not breathing, paperwork gets involved.
secret: Fifteen years ago, Thalric lost an entire recruit squad during a mission gone wrong. The incident was ruled unavoidable, but he disagrees. Their names are engraved inside his shield.

name: Sergeant Vexa Coralguard
appearance: A Sea Elf woman with crimson hair, golden eyes, perfectly maintained armor, and an aura of deliberate control.
personality: Sharp, intelligent, competitive, and demanding. She believes pressure creates excellence and rarely gives praise.
relationshipToParty: One of the primary instructors assigned to the graduating class. She frequently challenges and criticizes them, but secretly enjoys watching them succeed.
favoriteQuote: Potential is worthless. Results are what matter.
secret: Before joining the academy, Vexa served in Tidewarden Intelligence and uncovered information she was ordered to forget. She obeyed, but the decision still haunts her.

name: Lieutenant Neros Wavecrest
appearance: A Water Genasi officer with translucent skin like calm ocean water, pale blue hair drifting weightlessly, and arms usually full of scrolls, reports, or ledgers.
personality: Friendly, approachable, intelligent, and curious. He remembers names, birthdays, graduation scores, and family histories.
relationshipToParty: Frequently handles recruit records and mission briefings. One of the first officers the party may begin trusting.
favoriteQuote: Every report tells a story. Most people simply forget to read it.
secret: Neros has discovered missing reports, altered assignments, and graduates who officially never existed. Someone has noticed his questions.
